scores.correctness_notes: The agent answers a related but different question — it explains how to *create* a charm library (LIBID, LIBAPI, LIBPATCH, charmcraft create-lib, publish-lib) rather than how to *use* an existing charmlib to implement a provider. The gold standard focuses on finding an interface library in the listing, adding it as a PyPI package (charmlibs.interfaces.*) or fetching via charmcraft fetch-lib, then implementing the provider behavioural contract. The relation event patterns and app-vs-unit databag rules shown are correct overlapping content, hence partial credit.
scores.hallucination_notes: No hallucinated APIs — LIBID/LIBAPI/LIBPATCH metadata, CharmEvents, EventSource, EventBase, Object, relation.data access patterns, and charmcraft commands shown are all real and accurate.
